title: Preparation of 5N Hydrochloric Acid (HCl)
author: Jacquelina Woods
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.byfsptne

steps.title: Add Hydrochloric Acid to Water
steps.instruction: Slowly add 10.4 mL Hydrochloric Acid (HCl) Fisher Scientific Catalog #6000710, or equivalent to the water. This solution should be prepared under a chemical fume hood.

steps.title: Measure Deionized Water
steps.instruction: Measure 14.6 mL of deionized or ultrapure water into sterile container.
